summary.intent: Build a polished Electron app UI using Mantine as the component library, with GitHub-style dark/light mode, a chat transcript view for sessions, and relative timestamps throughout.
summary.outcome: Fully migrated all screens and components to Mantine, implemented working dark/light mode with `light-dark()` CSS, redesigned the session detail as a chat transcript with avatars, and added a shared `TimeAgo` component used across the app.

repo: Project is at /Users/stephanostsoucas/gossamer — Electron + electron-vite + React + React Router (MemoryRouter)
Renderer source lives at app/src/renderer/src/ with screens/, components/, and assets/ subdirectories
Server is at gossamer/src/server.ts with Prisma/SQLite backend; CheckpointSessionMetadata.createdAt used to populate Checkpoint.createdAt
Custom GitHub-inspired dark palette defined in main.tsx: dark[0..9] = #e6edf3 → #000000
Claude app icon extracted from /Applications/Claude.app/Contents/Resources/electron.icns via iconutil, stored at app/src/renderer/src/assets/claude-logo.png
BreadcrumbContext created at app/src/renderer/src/BreadcrumbContext.tsx for passing breadcrumb data from child pages to Layout header

code.finding: AppShell.Header must span full viewport width to keep hamburger visible when sidebar is collapsed; placing it inside AppShell.Main causes it to shift with the sidebar
Use light-dark(lightValue, darkValue) CSS function for all theme-aware colors — Mantine sets color-scheme on <html> which makes this work automatically
Groups consecutive ToolGroup events + Stop into claudeTurn units for rendering; ClaudeTurnCard renders message then collapsed tool uses below
Shared TimeAgo component: shows relative time, tooltip with absolute timestamp on hover, copies absolute value on click
CopyCell wraps Table.Td — on hover adds paddingRight:28 and shows absolute-positioned ActionIcon; brief checkmark confirmation on copy
PostCSS config required for Mantine CSS variables: postcss-preset-mantine + postcss-simple-vars with mantine breakpoint variables
TypeScript declaration file needed for .png imports in Vite/electron-vite projects

workflow: Mantine's X-0 color variants (e.g. var(--mantine-color-blue-0)) are always the lightest shade regardless of color scheme — never use them alone for dark mode
light-dark() CSS function works natively in Electron/Chromium without any polyfill
localStorageColorSchemeManager with a project-specific key persists color scheme across Electron sessions
GitHub avatar URL pattern: https://github.com/{username}.png — works as a quick avatar source without API calls
iconutil -c iconset can extract individual PNG sizes from .icns files on macOS

friction: Dark mode required multiple fix passes — initial Mantine migration used X-0 color variants that never adapt to dark mode, requiring a second sweep of all files
Hamburger button was placed inside AppShell.Main initially, causing it to be hidden when the sidebar collapsed — required understanding AppShell.Header's full-width spanning behavior
No Claude Code logo available as a ready-to-use asset in npm packages; had to extract from the installed macOS app using iconutil
TypeScript didn't recognize .png imports without a custom .d.ts declaration file
useLocation's state destructuring was left as dead code after a refactor, requiring cleanup
open_items: CheckpointDetail.tsx and CheckpointTimeline.tsx may still have hardcoded light colors not audited in this session
ToolUseItem.tsx and CheckpointMessageItem.tsx dark mode colors were patched but not fully verified in the chat transcript layout
The TimeAgo component uses relativeTime() inline in ToolGroupItem/ToolUseItem without a tooltip — consider using the full TimeAgo component there too
Activity dot thresholds (<2min active, <15min idle) are duplicated between SessionRow.tsx and SessionTree.tsx — could extract to a shared utility
Breadcrumbs only populated from the most recent session on the sessions list — may not reflect the actual filtered/viewed user/repo if multiple users are present
